title: Parallel Glint (Purple)
description: Stylish way of showing your enchanted items with parallel glints (Purple Version).
body:
Not long ago Minecraft had an update that changed the enchant glints a lot, they were separated into two files, one for armors and one for items, the armor one has lower exposure while item had higher, this cause the armor glints be barely seen, but good part they add two options to manage the speed and strength which didn't help much on the vanilla texture.

The screenshots are taken with:

- Glint Speed: 75%
- Glint Strength: 75%

This resource pack only has two colors based on the most downloaded files of the previous version which are purple (this) and aqua, if you want any other color you can edit the file and shift the HUEs to get your desired color for your personal experience.
